sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12861" key="a)po/klhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόκλησις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκλήω</orth>, <sense id="n12861.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπόκλεισις, ἀποκλείω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
